title: Prefetch, Goroutine Concurrency, and Capacity · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a measured consumer-capacity budget with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a measured consumer-capacity budget and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain RabbitMQ per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global QoS, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Bound concurrent handlers by CPU, memory, message bytes, downstream pools, deadlines, tenant fairness, and shutdown capacity; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Interpret consumer capacity with delivery rate, processing latency, ready and unacked depth, dependency saturation, and queue single-core limits; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Prefetch Window Semantics
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 8935 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine prefetch, active goroutines, dependency capacity, and message-byte budgets; name the owner and stop path for every goroutine and notification channel; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Explain RabbitMQ per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global QoS, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Prefetch Window Semantics trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Prefetch Window Semantics.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain rabbitmq per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global qos, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Prefetch Window Semantics, keep Prefetch Window Semantics connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
